items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 8: Conversation 8. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
• 7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.
• 9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.
• Dia dos namorados

items.text: Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?

items.prompt: I don’t want to go downtown. I want to go to the movies.
options: Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow? 2.
Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow? 3.
tomorrow? me with downtown go to want you Do
Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?

items.text: 7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.

items.prompt: 8- Do you drink a cup of tea in the afternoon? / coffee / milk
options: afternoon the in / morning the in / night? at English study you Do 7-.
7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.
7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon 3.
7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon 2.

items.text: 9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.

items.prompt: 10- Do you like to drink coffee or juice for breakfast? / coffee – tea / milj – juice
options: violin / guitar / piano? the play you Do 9-.
9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin 2.
9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin 3.
9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.
